category_sources: Official LCDproc documentation page at https://lcdproc.org/docs.php3 provides user and developer guides for configuring devices and the LCDd core.
source_facts.description says it displays real-time system information on an LCD.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and documentation consistently use LCDproc capitalization.
docs_sources: Official docs page is a dedicated documentation surface with user and developer guides.
source_facts.homepage is the official project homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/lcdproc/lcdproc, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official docs page covers device configuration, client language, driver API, and LCDd core.
source_facts.description identifies LCD system information display.
